codes.rationale: Vascular dementia is a secondary dementia type caused by cerebrovascular disease, not a primary degenerative dementia.
Multi-infarct dementia is a secondary dementia caused by cerebrovascular infarcts, not a primary degenerative dementia.
Ischemic vascular dementia is a secondary dementia caused by cerebrovascular ischemia, not a primary degenerative dementia.
Cortical vascular dementia is a secondary dementia caused by cerebrovascular disease, not a primary degenerative dementia.
Dialysis dementia is a secondary dementia caused by dialysis-related complications, not a primary degenerative dementia.
Vascular dementia in remission represents a resolved secondary dementia, not an active primary dementia.

codes.term: Primary degenerative dementia of the Alzheimer type, senile onset in remission (disorder)
codes.rationale: Alzheimer dementia in remission is ambiguous—it may represent resolved disease and should be excluded, but clinical context may warrant inclusion if remission status is tracked.

summary: Recall: 13.2% (43 of 325 reference codes retrieved). Precision: 66.1%. F1: 22.1%. 6 reference codes were incorrectly excluded.
